message:
fix(mcp_tools): fix duplicate McpEnvelope import and missing apply_tail_truncation

Completes the wildcard-to-explicit import refactoring that was left in a
broken state (duplicate McpEnvelope import from both mcp_types and super,
and apply_tail_truncation missing from the explicit import list).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
